metadata.note: Output used as-is without manual revision or selection.

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Maria's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. Maria swept the floor carefully.

The red balloon escaped from Daniel's hand beside the crowded fruit stand. The red balloon rose above the market stalls and crossed the narrow street. The red balloon struck a jagged sign above the bakery entrance. The red balloon sank into the fountain beside Daniel's bicycle.

The soup pot rattled on the stove during the noisy lunch rush. The soup pot slid across the burner and tipped toward the counter edge. The soup pot spilled hot broth over folded towels beside the sink. Clara grabbed the soup pot and scrubbed hot broth from tiles.

The paper boat floated from Leo's porch after the sudden gutter overflow. The paper boat entered the roadside stream and brushed against wet stones. The paper boat folded inward beside the storm drain near Leo's gate. Leo lifted the paper boat and carried the soggy scraps home.

The ladder wobbled on the porch while Naomi painted the upper window. The ladder shifted across loose gravel and struck the paint bucket. The paint bucket overturned and covered the steps with white paint. Naomi steadied the ladder and rinsed white paint with the hose.

The violin string tightened under Elena's hand during the rehearsal break. The violin string snapped above the bridge and struck the music stand. The violin string startled the conductor and silenced the rehearsal room. Elena replaced the violin string and tuned the instrument again.

The suitcase latch loosened during Kenji's walk across the crowded station. The suitcase latch sprang open beside the newspaper kiosk near platform seven. The suitcase latch released folded shirts onto the polished station floor. Kenji closed the suitcase latch and gathered every fallen shirt.

The garden hose twisted near the rose bed during the warm afternoon. The garden hose slipped from Aiko's hand and whipped across seedlings. The garden hose knocked three clay markers into the wet soil. Aiko caught the garden hose and reset the clay markers.

The candle lantern swayed above Samir's table during the evening meal. The candle lantern brushed the awning and spilled warm wax downward. The candle lantern darkened after the small flame met the wind. Samir lowered the candle lantern and relit the small flame.

The delivery cart rolled from the bakery door toward the market square. The delivery cart struck a cobblestone ridge and bounced against crates. The delivery cart spilled sesame rolls across the path beside the fountain. Omar stopped the delivery cart and stacked every sesame roll again.

The canoe drifted from Hana's grip beside the muddy riverbank reeds. The canoe turned sideways in the current and struck a fallen branch. The canoe filled with brown water near the narrow bend. Hana pulled the canoe ashore and emptied brown water with a bowl.

The clay mug slipped from Jun's tray beside the crowded workshop table. The clay mug struck the bench corner and cracked along the handle. The clay mug leaked warm tea across sketches and carving tools. Jun lifted the clay mug and wiped warm tea with cloths.

The picnic basket slipped from Nora's bicycle over the cobblestone bridge. The picnic basket hit the railing and burst open near the riverbank. The picnic basket spilled ripe peaches across the narrow walking path. Nora gathered the picnic basket and brushed dirt from every peach.

The camera strap loosened during Pavel's walk through the sculpture garden. The camera strap slid from Pavel's shoulder beside the marble arch. The camera strap dropped the camera onto soft grass near the roses. Pavel tightened the camera strap and inspected the scratched lens carefully.

The sandcastle stood near Lucia's blanket beside the bright incoming tide. The sandcastle lost one tower after the first cold wave arrived. The sandcastle collapsed across the moat under the second cold wave. Lucia rebuilt the sandcastle and raised thicker walls around the moat.

The kite climbed above Mina's roof during the strong spring breeze. The kite dipped near a chimney and caught the gutter hook. The kite tore across one corner and lost the long tail. Mina freed the kite and tied a fresh tail below.

The fishing net slipped from Arman's shoulder beside the wooden harbor ramp. The fishing net caught on a nail and split near the weights. The fishing net released silver fish across the damp planks. Arman gathered the fishing net and returned every silver fish quickly.

The sewing needle bent under Rosa's hand during the coat repair. The sewing needle snapped inside the thick cuff beside the button. The sewing needle left a jagged hole near the coat seam. Rosa removed the sewing needle and stitched the coat with thread.

The chalk box tipped from Sato's desk during the noisy lesson. The chalk box opened near the blackboard and scattered white sticks. The chalk box covered the floor with powder beside the front row. Sato closed the chalk box and swept white powder away.

The bread dough rose inside the bowl near the warm bakery oven. The bread dough pushed past the cloth and touched the wooden shelf. The bread dough sagged over the bowl and reached the flour tin. Marta folded the bread dough and cleaned the wooden shelf.

The snow shovel leaned beside Riku's door after the morning storm. The snow shovel slid across ice and struck the stone step. The snow shovel knocked the salt bucket into the narrow path. Riku grabbed the snow shovel and spread salt across ice.

The bicycle chain slipped during Yara's climb along the steep hill. The bicycle chain jammed near the pedal and stopped the rear wheel. The bicycle chain threw black grease across Yara's trouser leg. Yara reset the bicycle chain and wiped black grease away.

The terrarium lid shifted during Mei's cleaning near the sunny window. The terrarium lid fell behind the stand and opened a narrow gap. The grasshopper escaped through the narrow gap and landed on curtains. Mei replaced the terrarium lid and caught the grasshopper gently.

The honey jar tilted on the pantry shelf during the small tremor. The honey jar struck a bowl and cracked along the base. The honey jar poured thick honey over napkins and wooden spoons. Lila lifted the honey jar and rinsed thick honey away.

The window shutter banged against the wall during the sudden coastal storm. The window shutter loosened one hinge and scratched the outer brick. The window shutter tore free and landed across the herb planter. Diego caught the window shutter and tightened the loose hinge.

The alarm clock vibrated across Priya's table before the early train. The alarm clock reached the edge and dropped onto the slippers. The alarm clock split one corner and silenced the morning bell. Priya picked up the alarm clock and reset the morning bell.

The tomato crate shifted inside Yusuf's truck during the sharp turn. The tomato crate struck the door and snapped one side board. The tomato crate scattered red tomatoes across the loading ramp. Yusuf lifted the tomato crate and stacked every red tomato carefully.

The chessboard balanced near Eva's elbow during the crowded club meeting. The chessboard tilted across the table and sent pieces toward notebooks. The chessboard dropped one rook beneath the radiator by the wall. Eva lifted the chessboard and searched beneath the radiator quietly.

The flour sack leaned against the bakery counter near the front window. The flour sack split along one seam after the baker's quick lift. The flour sack dropped white flour across aprons and rolling pins. Marta tied the flour sack and brushed white flour away.

The umbrella opened above Seiji's head during the windy street crossing. The umbrella caught a strong gust and bent three metal ribs. The umbrella flipped inside out beside the newspaper stand near the crossing. Seiji closed the umbrella and straightened three metal ribs slowly.

The flower vase stood on the windowsill beside Ingrid's reading chair. The flower vase shook during the passing truck and touched the curtain. The flower vase fell onto the rug and scattered tulips widely. Ingrid lifted the flower vase and gathered every fallen tulip.

The rope bridge swayed under Marta's boots above the narrow gorge. The rope bridge caught a sharp gust and struck the cliff. The rope bridge dropped Marta's hat into the stream below. Marta crossed the rope bridge and watched the stream sadly.

The sketchbook rested beside Emil's knee near the windy pond. The sketchbook caught the breeze and flipped across the wooden dock. The sketchbook dropped into the water and darkened every pencil line. Emil recovered the sketchbook and copied every wet drawing later.

The key ring slipped from Haru's palm above the storm drain. The key ring bounced off the curb and dropped through bars. The key ring struck shallow water below the iron grate. Haru removed the grate and retrieved the key ring carefully.

The fishing rod bent under Chloe's grip along the wooden pier. The fishing rod caught the railing and snapped above the reel. The fishing rod dropped the line beside the floating bait bucket. Chloe gathered the fishing rod and packed the broken reel.

The wheelbarrow rattled across Oren's garden near the stone path. The wheelbarrow struck a root and tipped toward the vegetable rows. The wheelbarrow spilled black soil around the young lettuce leaves. Oren righted the wheelbarrow and returned black soil by hand.

The clay pot warmed inside the greenhouse during the long noon heat. The clay pot cracked along the rim and tilted toward basil. The clay pot spilled dark soil across the brick walkway. Rafael replaced the clay pot and swept dark soil aside.

The theater curtain shook above Amina's stage during the dress rehearsal. The theater curtain jammed on the rail and exposed the painted backdrop. The theater curtain tore near the hem above the footlights. Amina lowered the theater curtain and pinned the torn hem.

The suitcase wheel snapped during Felix's run across the airport hall. The suitcase wheel twisted sideways and dragged sparks beside the tiles. The suitcase wheel forced the suitcase against a row of metal seats. Felix lifted the suitcase and replaced the broken wheel quickly.

The milk bottle waited on Keiko's doorstep before the first sunrise. The milk bottle rolled from the step after the cat's jump. The milk bottle struck the path and spread milk across pebbles. Keiko collected the milk bottle and washed milk from sandals.

The blackboard eraser slipped from Imani's hand during the algebra lesson. The blackboard eraser struck the ledge and burst chalk dust upward. The blackboard eraser covered three desks with pale white powder. Imani picked up the blackboard eraser and wiped three desks clean.

The rain gutter clogged above Luis's garage during the hard downpour. The rain gutter overflowed near the corner and soaked the tool bench. The rain gutter dropped leaves across the open paint tins. Luis cleared the rain gutter and moved the open paint tins.

The bookshelf leaned against Nora's wall after the missing bolt loosened. The bookshelf shifted forward and dropped atlases onto the carpet. The bookshelf pinned the reading lamp beside the green armchair. Nora straightened the bookshelf and tightened the missing bolt firmly.

The pumpkin wagon rolled from Celia's stall during the autumn fair. The pumpkin wagon hit a rut and tipped beside the carousel fence. The pumpkin wagon scattered striped pumpkins across the sawdust path. Celia stopped the pumpkin wagon and stacked striped pumpkins again.

The violin case slipped from Andre's chair after the rehearsal ended. The violin case struck the floor and opened beside the music stand. The violin case dropped sheet music beneath the second violin desk. Andre closed the violin case and flattened every folded page.

The coffee grinder rattled on Margo's counter during the busy breakfast hour. The coffee grinder hopped toward the sink and struck the sugar jar. The coffee grinder covered the counter with dark coffee grounds. Margo unplugged the coffee grinder and wiped dark coffee grounds away.

The curtain rod loosened above Lena's bed during the window repair. The curtain rod slid from the bracket and struck the nightstand lamp. The curtain rod bent one ring and tore the blue curtain. Lena raised the curtain rod and stitched the blue curtain.

The scarecrow leaned across the field during the first hard wind. The scarecrow lost one sleeve and dropped straw near the fence. The scarecrow collapsed beside the pumpkins before the crows arrived. Elias rebuilt the scarecrow and tied fresh straw inside firmly.

The ice bucket rested near Quinn's blanket during the riverside picnic. The ice bucket tipped after one kick and rolled toward sandwiches. The ice bucket soaked napkins and chilled the bread on stones. Quinn caught the ice bucket and replaced the wet napkins.

The sewing machine hummed on Daria's table during the costume fitting. The sewing machine snapped one belt and stopped beside the pinned fabric. The sewing machine trapped blue thread around the silver wheel. Daria opened the sewing machine and removed the tangled thread.

The map sheet unfolded in Tomas's hands during the windy hike. The map sheet slipped above the cliff path and struck a thorn bush. The map sheet tore across the valley sketch near the fold. Tomas rescued the map sheet and traced the valley sketch again.

The greenhouse fan rattled above Irene's seedlings during the humid morning. The greenhouse fan stopped without warning and silenced the cool airflow. The greenhouse fan left the tomato leaves hanging under heavy heat. Irene restarted the greenhouse fan and opened the roof vent.
